description: The Primeiro Comando da Capital (PCC) is the largest criminal organization in Brazil, founded on August 31, 1993, in the Casa de Custódia de Taubaté prison. It operates primarily in São Paulo state but also throughout Brazil and neighboring countries. The PCC is involved in drug trafficking, cargo theft, bank robberies, and kidnappings, with an estimated 40,000 members. It has been considered Brazil's first mafia since September 2020.
